run_summary.summary:
Scanned 2 emails from the last 24 hours — both are SENT emails from Liz on Apr 14, outbound follow-ups after she got back from vacation. Two active negotiations are in play and both have gone quiet while Liz was away:

1. **Dreo** (via Vanzo Media) — Liz quoted $3K on Apr 1 for an IG misting fan campaign (1 Reel co-post + 1 Story + link in bio 7 days). No response from Yaki at Vanzo Media, so Liz followed up Apr 14. 🚨 Posting window is April 15–30 — that's RIGHT NOW. Someone needs to confirm or close this one fast.

2. **Bringnox** — Liz has been going back and forth with Camellia Liang (xcamellia100@gmail.com) on an IG reel deal. Liz countered at $2K without an ad code (usage rights would be extra). Camellia came back with something and then things went quiet while Liz was traveling. Liz followed up Apr 14 to re-engage. No value confirmed yet.

Both deals need Kenny's attention to confirm status and next steps. If either brand isn't already in the tracker, it should be added.

deals.notes: Via Vanzo Media (global influencer agency). Deliverables: 1 IG Reel co-post with DREO, Link in bio 7 days, 1 Story with link. Posting window: April 15–30. Liz quoted $3K on Apr 1, followed up Apr 14 after no response — Liz was on vacation. Kenny CC'd on latest email.
deals.activity_note: Apr 14: Liz sent follow-up to Yaki at Vanzo Media — no response to $3K quote from Apr 1. Posting window April 15–30 is URGENT. Kenny CC'd.

deals.notes: IG reel collaboration. Liz countered at $2K without ad code — usage rights would be charged separately based on length of time. Camellia replied (unclear ask) and then thread went quiet while Liz was traveling.
deals.activity_note: Apr 14: Liz sent follow-up to Camellia Liang after vacation — ongoing negotiation on IG reel at $2K (no ad code). Kenny CC'd. Awaiting Camellia's response.
